phases.name: Pinecone Store Implementation
phases.description: Implement PineconeStore class with full VectorStore interface

tasks.description: READ Pinecone SDK documentation and understand index/namespace model
CREATE src/integration/vector/pinecone-store.ts with PineconeStore class
acceptance_criteria: Constructor accepts PineconeConfig with apiKey, indexName, namespace
clear() deletes all vectors in namespace
stats() returns record count and dimension

tasks.description: ADD error handling for missing PINECONE_API_KEY
acceptance_criteria: Throw VectorStoreError with CONFIGURATION_ERROR if API key missing
Clear error message: 'PINECONE_API_KEY environment variable required'

phases.success_criteria: PineconeStore compiles and passes basic unit tests

phases.name: Chroma Store Implementation
phases.description: Implement ChromaStore class with full VectorStore interface

tasks.description: READ Chroma client documentation and understand collection model
CREATE src/integration/vector/chroma-store.ts with ChromaStore class
acceptance_criteria: Constructor accepts ChromaConfig with url, collectionName
clear() deletes collection or all records
stats() returns record count and dimension

tasks.description: ADD fallback to localhost if CHROMA_URL not set
acceptance_criteria: Default to http://localhost:8000 if no env var

phases.success_criteria: ChromaStore compiles and passes basic unit tests

phases.name: CLI Integration
phases.description: Wire new stores to CLI commands

tasks.description: MODIFY src/cli/rag-index.ts createVectorStore() to support pinecone/chroma
acceptance_criteria: Switch statement or factory for store type
Fallback to SQLite if env vars missing with warning

tasks.description: MODIFY src/cli/rag-search.ts createVectorStore() to support pinecone/chroma

phases.name: Dependencies and Testing
phases.description: Add package dependencies and test implementations

tasks.description: ADD @pinecone-database/pinecone to package.json dependencies
ADD chromadb to package.json dependencies
RUN pnpm install to fetch dependencies
CREATE unit test for PineconeStore with mocked client
CREATE unit test for ChromaStore with mocked client
TEST integration with Ollama embeddings (768-dim)

phases.name: Documentation and Close-out

tasks.description: UPDATE improvements.json: mark IMP-CORE-065 as done
UPDATE note in improvements.json (7 open items remaining)
COMMIT all changes with conventional commits
PUSH to origin main
UPDATE workorder communication.json with completion status
UPDATE TRACKING/workorders.json status to complete

phases.success_criteria: IMP-CORE-065 marked done, all commits pushed, tracking updated

hard_stops.gate: PineconeStore compiles and passes basic unit tests
ChromaStore compiles and passes basic unit tests

quality_gates: Both stores implement full VectorStore interface
CLI --store flag works for both new stores
All 4 required files exist in workorder directory
